commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=581f9659a477c2184a3a11264cf1fc8bbcef839d)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `healthChecks` ownership to doctor health contributions, routes `doctor --lint` through contribution-ordered core checks before extension checks, narrows broad structured repair to non-core checks, updates tests/docs, and deletes the conversion-plan ledger.

PR surface: Source -91, Tests +135, Docs +2. Total +46 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: a `healthChecks`-only contribution calls `runDoctorHealthRepairs()` and then ignores `result.findings`, so detect-only findings have no normal doctor output. I did not execute the CLI because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human follow-up is needed because the PR has a protected maintainer label, a blocking code finding, and missing contributor real behavior proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor.

target.title: Keep core doctor health in contribution order
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
